body:
## Rationale

Mike Mangini is Dream Theater's current drummer (joined 2010 after Mike Portnoy's exit). He has a profile page on MetalForge and a `whats-in-mike-manginis-kit.md` article, but **zero album-specific editorial content**.

'A Dramatic Turn of Events' (2011) was Mangini's debut DT album — a landmark moment in prog metal: the world's most technically demanding band choosing a new drummer. The recording story (Mangini overdubbing all 5 candidate demos, then winning the audition live on YouTube) is heavily searched.

**Confirmed absent from `albumArticles.js`:** `mike-mangini-drum-setup`, `a-dramatic-turn-of-events-drum-setup` — neither slug exists.

**Search targets:**
- "mike mangini drum setup" (high intent, no current article)
- "dream theater a dramatic turn of events drummer"
- "mike mangini kit dream theater"

## Content shape (≥400 words)

```js
{
  slug: 'a-dramatic-turn-of-events-drum-setup',
  drummerSlug: 'mike-mangini',
  title: "Mike Mangini's Kit on 'A Dramatic Turn of Events' (Dream Theater, 2011)",
  albumYear: 2011,
  band: 'Dream Theater',
  genre: 'Progressive Metal',
  intro: 'World-record holder Mike Mangini replaced Mike Portnoy using a...',
  // gear: DW Collector's Maple kit, Meinl Byzance cymbals, DW 9002 double pedals
  // key tracks: 'On the Backs of Angels', 'Build Me Up Break Me Down', 'Lost Not Forgotten'
  // recording notes: Mangini recorded all drums at BerkleeNYC sessions, Neil Dorfsman producing
}
```

## File to touch

- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — append new entry at end of ALBUM_ARTICLES array

## Quality gate

- ≥400 words
- 3+ FAQ Q&A ("What drums did Mike Mangini use?", "What cymbals on A Dramatic Turn of Events?", "When did Mike Mangini join Dream Theater?")
- Internal links: drummer profile + related articles (images-and-words for Portnoy comparison)
- MusicAlbum schema with drummerSlug, albumYear, band

## Verify

1. `grep 'a-dramatic-turn-of-events' packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — entry present
2. Visit https://metalforge.io/articles/a-dramatic-turn-of-events-drum-setup — returns article page
3. `curl -s https://metalforge.io/api/meta?path=/articles/a-dramatic-turn-of-events-drum-setup | jq '.title'` — keyword-matched title

## Done

- [x] Article entry in albumArticles.js (≥400 words, 3 FAQ, internal links, schema)
title: SEO: Mike Mangini — 'A Dramatic Turn of Events' Dream Theater drum setup article
